claim_tested: The corpus can be traced from arXiv papers to audited materials and timeline records.
primary_filters: snapshot version fixed; exclude retracted where indicated
transformation: Count records at each pipeline stage and mark exclusions
statistical_or_quality_test: Reconcile counts against SCLib stats endpoint and frozen DB export
validation_requirement: No manual scientific validation required; counts must be reproducible

claim_tested: The 1996-2026 landscape is stratified by Tc regime, family, pressure, and evidence type.
transformation: Scatter and density layer by year, Tc, family, theory/experiment, pressure
statistical_or_quality_test: Check plot with and without 2026; check experimental-only version
validation_requirement: Validate all visible high-Tc outliers and random sample across years

working_title: Tc distribution by measurement and material
claim_tested: The apparent density bands persist after reducing repeated measurements.
primary_filters: same as Fig2; material-level uses tc_max and tc_ambient
transformation: Histogram/KDE by Tc bands for both levels
statistical_or_quality_test: Bootstrap by paper_id; compare band densities
validation_requirement: Validate sample from each Tc band

claim_tested: The 50-80 K band is sparse and compositionally different from the 80-100 K cuprate plateau.
transformation: Stacked bar chart by Tc band and family
statistical_or_quality_test: Band-density gap ratio with bootstrap CI; chi-square or negative-binomial sensitivity

claim_tested: The 50-80 K region is underfilled relative to neighboring bands and lacks a dominant repeated family platform.
statistical_or_quality_test: Material-weighted gap ratio; repeat excluding top 10 repeated materials
validation_requirement: Manual review of top 50 records in 50-80 K

claim_tested: The 80-100 K plateau is dominated by cuprates, especially YBCO-related systems.
transformation: Family share, top material formulas, parent-family collapse
statistical_or_quality_test: Cuprate share with bootstrap CI; sensitivity after formula parent collapse
validation_requirement: Manual review of top repeated cuprate formulas

claim_tested: New family research waves can be detected as sudden increases in family-year records, materials, and papers.
statistical_or_quality_test: Burst threshold C>=20, score>=3, M>=3; sensitivity using paper counts
validation_requirement: Manual review for each declared burst anchor year

claim_tested: The 2008 iron-based wave is the strongest new-family burst in the corpus.
transformation: Monthly counts, earliest papers, Tc progression
statistical_or_quality_test: Compare 2008 with prior 3-year baseline and all other families
validation_requirement: Validate 100 sampled 2008 iron-based records and all cited anchor papers

claim_tested: The high-Tc frontier differs sharply between experimental ambient, experimental high-pressure, theory ambient, and theory high-pressure records.
primary_filters: needs_review=false; valid pressure class; complete years plus partial 2026 as supplement
transformation: Max Tc envelope per year and evidence regime
statistical_or_quality_test: Sensitivity excluding unknown pressure; validate high-Tc envelope points
validation_requirement: Manual review of every point defining yearly envelope above 100 K

claim_tested: High-Tc hydrides and modern nickelates are pressure-dependent evidence regimes, not directly comparable to ambient cuprates.
transformation: Pressure vs Tc scatter by experiment/theory and year
statistical_or_quality_test: Compare pressure distributions by family; flag missing pressure
validation_requirement: Manual review all hydride experimental Tc>=150 K and nickelate Tc>=50 K

claim_tested: Some theoretical predictions are experimentally followed, while many high-Tc predictions remain theoretical-only.
primary_filters: materials with both theory and experimental records
statistical_or_quality_test: Distribution of lags; separate hydrides, nickelates, others
validation_requirement: Manual review every lag case with Tc>=100 K

claim_tested: The review's scientific claims are bounded by measured extraction accuracy.
transformation: Compute field-level accuracy and false-positive rates
statistical_or_quality_test: Wilson confidence intervals for accuracy metrics
validation_requirement: All validation disagreements adjudicated before final manuscript
